idea-plugin.name: Zed One
idea-plugin.description:
Port of the Zed One theme from the Zed editor to JetBrains IDEs.
Includes both One Dark and One Light variants with full syntax highlighting, UI theming, console ANSI colors, and icon tinting.

Based on the original theme by Zed Industries.
idea-plugin.change-notes: Initial release of the Zed One theme with Dark and Light variants.
